_comment: Extra source-reputation hints merged on top of the built-in lists. Use with --reputation-file or RESEARCH_AGENT_REPUTATION_FILE. Domains are matched on the host or any subdomain.
_weights_comment: Optional per-domain score adjustments (points added on top of the category heuristic, clamped to [-100, 100] each and applied before the final 0-100 clamp). Positive nudges a domain up, negative down. Matches the host or any subdomain.
